welcome.headline: Tu estudio completo para crear música en la nube
welcome.subheadline: Crea, colabora y publica tu música con herramientas de IA e instrumentos de calidad profesional.

_notes.headline: Uses the es-ES brand tagline from markets/es-es.md ('Tu estudio completo para crear música en la nube') as it directly matches the EN intent and is already validated market copy.
_notes.subheadline: Transcreated from the market positioning statement. 'distribuir' → 'publicar' per market file ('publish/distribute = publicar / distribuir'). 'IA' used for AI per es-ES conventions. 'la nube' omitted from subheadline to avoid repetition with headline.
_notes.cta_primary: Imperative form per es-ES microcopy rules. Must match steps.finish_button and confirmation.cta_primary exactly.
_notes.legal_note: [PLACEHOLDER] {terms_link} and {privacy_link} are inline hyperlinks. 'nuestros' is masculine plural agreeing with 'Términos' (the expected link label) — link text gender should be confirmed at render time.

_notes.step_label: [PLACEHOLDER] {current} and {total} are integers. Numeric formatting follows es-ES conventions (no special formatting for integers).
_notes.finish_button: Must match welcome.cta_primary exactly — single source of truth. Value: 'Empieza a crear gratis'.

signup.page_subtitle: Únete a {user_count} músicos y productores en ECHOCRAFT.
signup.field_password_hint: Usa una combinación de letras, números y símbolos.

_notes.page_subtitle: [PLACEHOLDER] {user_count} is a formatted integer. 'músicos y productores' uses masculine plural as grammatical default in Spanish — inclusive reading intended. [EXPANSION RISK] String expands slightly from EN.
_notes.field_email_placeholder: Localised to 'tu@ejemplo.com' — 'ejemplo.com' is the recognised Spanish-language equivalent of 'example.com'.
_notes.signin_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signin_link} is an inline hyperlink. ¿? punctuation applied per es-ES conventions.

signin.page_subtitle: Inicia sesión para continuar con tu estudio.

_notes.page_title: Transcreated as '¡De vuelta al estudio!' to avoid gender inflection required by the literal 'Bienvenido/a de nuevo' while keeping the voice warm and motivating (es-ES market: cercana, motivadora). Studio reference reinforces brand identity.
_notes.submit_button: Must match dashboard.nav.sign_in casing for consistency — both use 'Iniciar sesión'.
_notes.signup_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signup_link} is an inline hyperlink. ECHOCRAFT is always uppercase — not translated or adapted. ¿? punctuation applied.

profile_setup.page_subtitle: Cuéntanos sobre ti para personalizar tu experiencia.

_notes.page_subtitle: Shorter than EN source — no expansion risk. 'personalizar' is the correct Spanish verb.
_notes.field_role_label: Trailing ellipsis (…) preserved per source instruction. Natural in Spanish for an open-ended prompt.
_notes.field_role_option_producer: '/a' split form used across all role options for gender inclusivity in the es-ES market (common in modern Spain SaaS). [GENDER HOOK] resolved via '/a' form rather than masculine default.
_notes.field_role_option_songwriter: 'Compositor/a' chosen over 'Cantautor/a' (which implies singing). 'Compositor' covers the songwriting/composing role without assuming the user also performs.
_notes.field_role_option_mixing_engineer: [GENDER HOOK] '/a' form applied. 'mezcla' is the approved market term for 'mix'.
_notes.field_role_option_sound_designer: [GENDER HOOK] '/a' form applied. 'Diseñador/a de sonido' is the literal translation — see also template_sound_design [REVIEW] for the Sound Design anglicism question.
_notes.avatar_upload_hint: [PLACEHOLDER] {max_size} is an integer. 'máx.' is the standard Spanish abbreviation for 'máximo'.

plan_selection.page_subtitle: Tanto para artistas en solitario como para equipos de producción, tenemos el plan que necesitas.
plan_selection.audience_tab_creator_description: Para músicos y productores en solitario
plan_selection.billing_free_trial_note: Empieza tu prueba gratuita — sin tarjeta de crédito.

_notes.audience_tab_creator: Plan_Group — do not translate. Ontology term plan_00000001, status: approved.
_notes.audience_tab_studio: [REVIEW] 'Studio' kept as Plan_Group anglicism per class translation policy (do_not_translate). Studio plans not present in current ontology — confirm with localization lead.
_notes.tier_label_starter: Brand tier name — do not translate. Per CLAUDE.md rules and ontology class policy.
_notes.tier_label_pro: Brand tier name — do not translate.
_notes.tier_label_max: Brand tier name — do not translate.
_notes.tier_badge_popular: 'Más popular' (11 chars) vs 'Most Popular' (12 chars) — within budget. [EXPANSION RISK] flagged in source was not a problem for es-ES.
_notes.pricing_per_month: '/mes' displayed inline after price: '9,99 €/mes'. Currency symbol and formatting handled by billing system. Number formatting: decimal comma, space before € per es-ES locale conventions.
_notes.cta_contact_sales: 'Contactar con ventas' uses the standard Spain phrasing (not 'Contacta con el equipo de ventas' — too long for a button).

_notes.creator_starter_name: Plan name — do not translate. Tier labels (Starter, Pro, Max) kept per rules. Audience labels (Creator, Studio) kept per Plan_Group do_not_translate policy.
_notes.creator_pro_tagline: 'Flujo completo de composición' (29 chars) vs 'Full songwriting workflow' (24 chars). Moderate expansion — within ~30% budget for taglines. 'Composición' chosen over 'songwriting' (anglicism) to keep copy natural for the market.
_notes.studio_starter_name: [REVIEW] Studio plans not in current ontology — confirm plan names with localization lead.

plan_features.feature_includes_starter: Todas las funciones de Creator Starter
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_starter: Todas las funciones de Creator Starter
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_pro: Todo lo de Studio Starter, más:
plan_features.feature_includes_creator_pro: Todas las funciones de Creator Pro
plan_features.feature_includes_creator_max: Todas las funciones de Creator Max
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_pro_all: Todo lo de Studio Pro, más:

_notes.midi_editor: Ontology feat_00000001: approved es-ES term 'editor MIDI'. Capitalized for display as 'Editor MIDI'. MIDI acronym not translated.
_notes.piano_roll: Ontology feat_00000006: anglicism 'Piano Roll' retained. Universally understood in DAW contexts in Spain.
_notes.pattern_sequencer: Ontology feat_00000002: approved es-ES term 'secuenciador por patrones'. Capitalized for display.
_notes.arrangement_timeline: Ontology feat_00000007: approved es-ES term 'línea de arreglos'. Capitalized for display.
_notes.multitrack_recording_8: Ontology feat_00000009: approved es-ES term 'grabación multipista'. '8 pistas' added to match EN parenthetical format.
_notes.audio_comping: [REVIEW] 'Audio Comping' kept as anglicism — term not in ontology. Source note suggests anglicism likely preferred in DAW contexts. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.punch_in_recording: [REVIEW] 'Punch-In Recording' kept as anglicism — term not in ontology. Source note states anglicism likely preferred. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.virtual_instruments_10: Ontology feat_00000003: approved es-ES term 'instrumento virtual' (plural: 'instrumentos virtuales').
_notes.sample_library_20gb: Ontology feat_00000008: approved es-ES term 'librería de samples'. 'samples' retained as anglicism per ontology.
_notes.effects_rack: Ontology feat_00000010: approved es-ES term 'rack de efectos'. Capitalized for display.
_notes.eq_compression: [REVIEW] 'EQ' kept as anglicism (standard audio abbreviation for equalizer). 'compresión' is the natural Spanish translation. Confirm EQ anglicism preference with ontology lead.
_notes.mastering_chain: Ontology feat_00000012: approved es-ES term 'cadena de mástering'. AVAILABILITY WARNING: ontology marks this feature as 'not_available' for es-ES market — check with product team whether this string should be displayed.
_notes.loudness_analyzer: [REVIEW] 'Analizador de loudness' — 'loudness' kept as anglicism (has specific technical meaning: LUFS loudness measurement). Term not in ontology. Confirm approved form.
_notes.melody_generator: Ontology feat_00000011: approved es-ES term 'generador de melodías'. Capitalized for display.
_notes.chord_progression_generator: Ontology feat_00000014: approved es-ES term 'generador de progresiones de acordes'. Capitalized for display. String is longer than EN — acceptable in feature list context.
_notes.drum_pattern_generator: [REVIEW] 'Generador de patrones de batería' — term not in ontology. 'patrones de batería' is the natural Spanish for 'drum patterns'. Confirm approved form.
_notes.style_transfer: Ontology feat_00000013: approved es-ES term 'transferencia de estilos'. AVAILABILITY WARNING: ontology marks this feature as 'planned' (not yet available) for es-ES market.
_notes.export_mp3: Ontology feat_00000005: approved es-ES term 'exportar en mp3'. Capitalized for display as 'Exportar en MP3'. MP3 acronym not translated.
_notes.export_wav_flac: Ontology feat_00000015: approved es-ES term 'exportar en wav/flac'. Capitalized for display as 'Exportar en WAV/FLAC'. WAV and FLAC acronyms not translated.
_notes.one_click_distribution: [REVIEW] 'Distribución en un clic' — term not in ontology. Natural Spanish rendering. Confirm approved form.
_notes.track_metadata_editor: [REVIEW] 'Editor de metadatos de pista' — term not in ontology. 'pista' used for 'track' per market file. Confirm approved form.
_notes.shared_projects: [REVIEW] 'Proyectos compartidos' — term not in ontology. Confirm approved form.
_notes.real_time_jam_sessions: [REVIEW] 'Sesiones de jam en directo' — term not in ontology. 'En directo' preferred over 'en tiempo real' for natural Spain tone. 'Jam' retained as anglicism (common in music contexts). Confirm approved form.
_notes.unlimited_jam_sessions: [REVIEW] 'Sesiones de jam ilimitadas' — term not in ontology. Confirm approved form.
_notes.version_history: [REVIEW] 'Historial de versiones' — term not in ontology. Standard Spanish rendering. Confirm approved form.
_notes.comments_markers: [REVIEW] 'Comentarios y marcadores' — term not in ontology. Confirm approved form.
_notes.interactive_lessons: [REVIEW] 'Lecciones interactivas' — term not in ontology. Confirm approved form.
_notes.chord_explorer: [REVIEW] 'Explorador de acordes' — term not in ontology. Confirm approved form.
_notes.scale_assistant: [REVIEW] 'Asistente de escalas' — term not in ontology. 'Asistente' used in the tool/helper sense, not the AI sense. Confirm approved form.
_notes.feature_includes_starter: [LENGTH] 'Todas las funciones de Creator Starter' (38 chars) vs 'All Creator Starter features' (28 chars). Monitor truncation in plan comparison UI.
_notes.feature_includes_creator_pro: [LENGTH] 'Todas las funciones de Creator Pro' (35 chars) vs 'All Creator Pro features' (24 chars). Monitor truncation.
_notes.feature_includes_creator_max: [LENGTH] 'Todas las funciones de Creator Max' (35 chars) vs 'All Creator Max features' (24 chars). Monitor truncation.

_notes.page_title: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is the user's display name. Transcreated as '¡Todo listo, {name}!' to avoid the [GENDER HOOK] issue in 'Bienvenido/a' — 'Todo listo' is gender-neutral and equally warm.
_notes.checklist_plan: [PLACEHOLDER] {plan_name} inserts a localised plan name (e.g. 'Creator Pro'). Word order adjusted to 'Plan {plan_name} activado' — more natural in Spanish than '{plan_name} plan activado'.
_notes.cta_primary: Must match welcome.cta_primary and steps.finish_button exactly. Value: 'Empieza a crear gratis'.
_notes.cta_secondary: Transcreated from 'Take a quick tour' — 'Ver la guía rápida' is more natural than a literal 'Haz un recorrido rápido'.
